headline: Ventas Names Andrew L. Wattula EVP Outpatient Medical & Research
summary: CHICAGO, June 22, 2026--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) ("Ventas" or the "Company") today announced that the Company has named Andrew L. Wattula Executive Vice President, Outpatient Medical & Research and CEO of Lillibridge Healthcare Services, a wholly-owned property management and leasing subsidiary of Ventas, effective August 2026. He will oversee the Company’s differentiated outpatient medical and research business, which is a leading owner and manager of properties operating at the intersection of
